misc: Rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand
biography: Hailing from St. Laurence Golf, Martin is preparing for a significant milestone at the Hector Trophée 2026, as he is set to make his eleventh appearance in this esteemed annual competition. His enduring presence over more than a decade underscores a steadfast commitment to the event and the sport.

Martin's competitive record is particularly distinguished by his dual success. He has notably captured the coveted Hector Trophée with his partner on one occasion, showcasing his ability to thrive in the unique team format. Furthermore, he has also claimed the prestigious Victor Trophy once, a testament to his individual prowess and consistency in the demanding solo competition.

A familiar figure on the fairways, Martin is often characterized by a distinctive casualness, rarely seen without a beverage in hand – a trait that belies his competitive fire and focus when it matters most. As he continues to be an active participant in Hector events, his pursuit of further accolades in the Hector Trophée 2026 is anticipated with keen interest, as he seeks to add another chapter to his already impressive tournament history.
